description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular industrial building with a corrugated metal arched roof and large, grid-like translucent upper wall panels, likely made of frosted glass or polycarbonate. The lower portion of the exterior is constructed from weathered concrete or stone, featuring visible stains and signs of age. Multiple vertical ventilation grilles and rectangular wall-mounted elements are present along the base, suggesting robust airflow or climate control. One side includes a large, rusted metal door, indicating the main entry point, while the other sides are windowless and solid. The structure is utilitarian, with minimal decorative features, emphasizing function over form. The overall appearance is consistent with older urban warehouses found in industrial districts.
description: A weathered industrial warehouse with a corrugated metal arched roof, translucent upper wall panels, and a concrete lower facade featuring ventilation grilles and a large metal entry door.
description_view_0: The facade shows a grid of translucent panels above a stained concrete wall with four ventilation grilles and two rectangular wall fixtures.
description_view_1: This side displays the arched metal roof and a long stretch of concrete wall with multiple vertical ventilation grilles and wall fixtures, but no visible entry.
description_view_2: This view highlights the main entry, a large rusted metal door set into the concrete wall, with two wall fixtures and ventilation grilles nearby.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side features the arched roof and a long concrete wall with vertical ventilation grilles and wall fixtures, but no entry points.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a grid of translucent panels above a weathered concrete base, punctuated by rectangular ventilation grilles and a large rusted metal entry door. The design is strictly functional, with no decorative elements and a focus on durability and utility.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is arched and constructed from corrugated metal panels, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or additional rooftop structures. Its ribbed texture and metallic finish are prominent features.
